pair-device.detail: CLI minted a PAKE code; browser claimed it; device mutually remembered (stored=1, live tile=false)

web-shell.detail: paired up --shell peer; opened a real terminal; typed a command; saw its output over the data channel

device-sheet-mobile.detail: tile-v2 mobile tap→sheet (Send leads) verified on a real remembered device

device-sheet-desktop.detail: tile-v2 desktop hover bar→sheet verified on a real remembered device

sessions-dock.detail: sessions dock: opened a real terminal, backgrounded (PTY survived), switched, and closed

cmd-k.detail: ⌘K palette: opened, filtered, and ran the open-terminal action against a real shell device

pwa-update.detail: two builds → real SW update: new service worker took control (auto-reload via skipWaiting/controllerchange, controller=true)
